steps.t: Retrieve the flowers from outside Zajâna that the Pohâni Têredal mentioned.
Return to the Pohâni Têredal in the Kalmakhíla in Zajâna.
Create raised beds for the flowers in the flower bed within the Kalmakhíla in Zajâna.
Plant the harvested flowers in the holes you've dug within the Kalmakhíla in Zajâna.
Gather water from the bucket near the planted flowers in the Kalmakhíla in Zajâna.
Water the planted flowers in the flower bed within the Kalmakhíla in Zajâna.
Return to the Pohâni Têredal in the Kalmakhíla and report on your success.
